title: Additions
description: More items and tweaks that enhance your minecraft experience!
body:
Additions is a 1.20.1+ mod that adds many new items/tweaks to the game and will be receiving many more!



## Additions:

**New resources:**

Tin
Bronze
Steel
Ruby

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2bc11929bb058741ea945f6ff39f9c393c0ea80_0.webp)
Tin is a common resource found underground in the overworld
Bronze and Steel are craftable
Rubies can be found in the nether

Includes tools/armor/nuggets and everything else you would expect from these resources

Rubies have no use as of now but will in the future



**Flint Tools:**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/666a318ccc1da0d89a432dc45f89a3259b1aec47.png)

Early game tools craftable from flint



**Gems:**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5072b0cea49665919d9d7df8111b60133a0a676.png)

Gems are bascially nuggets for gem type resources and can be crafted into their full form or into their smaller one

compatable with ice and fire sapphire gems

**Tweaks:**

Additions also adds some tweaks to the game as well


**Blast Furnace Tweak:**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e94816252045f28641b2ee6abf52dff80f8965e.png)

Makes the blast furnace require steel instead of iron (can be disabled)



**Recipes:**

Horse armor recipes

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47ccb5a506cc19ae54fe275b97403dfac13e16d5.png)![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4049ef904e57e3ffa2bc6c08315f654522e0da0c.png)![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/873df8b50bb59acfe8b4da84d939f8ef806647de.png)![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9253d69814ca034af4b3f69517dde8d2e5c7754d.png)

Enables the bundle with a recipe for it

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b113f83b3a5b9e239e78c89d7789c3d86249d3a8.png)

**Saddle Recipe:**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e300bfbefa2e5003eda35c1146ba74c0b86d363f.png)


**Gameplay Tweaks:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Attack Through Grass**

Allows attacking entities through grass without breaking the grass

 

**Lightning Prevention**

Disables items from being destroyed when struck by lightning

 

**Random Mob HP** (Mob Rarities)

Makes mobs now spawn with rarities with there being common/uncommon/rare/epic/legendary/shiny variants, each variant increases mobs max hp by higher amounts with small ranges while epic and legendary variants drop increased experience.

</details>



Future Plans:

Rextextures for many items

More config options and balances as well as more big features
